text:
I'll search for this Llama 3.1 Community License Agreement to verify its authenticity and metadata.
Based on my web search, I found the official Llama 3.1 Community License Agreement. The search results show multiple sources (including the official llama.com website and a PDF from MySQL) that confirm the existence of this license document published by Meta Platforms, Inc. in July 2024.

The cited URL points to the HuggingFace model repository hosting of the license file. While the HuggingFace page title shows as "LICENSE · meta-llama/Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct at main" (a repository file path display) rather than the full formal title, this is a normal HuggingFace interface convention—the actual document itself is titled "LLAMA 3.1 COMMUNITY LICENSE AGREEMENT" as confirmed by the official sources.

The author is correctly cited as Meta Platforms, Inc., and the year 2024 (specifically July 23, 2024 as the version release date) is accurate. The discrepancy noted by the automated checker about "Hugging Face" as the actual author refers to the repository host, not the copyright holder or originating organization—Meta Platforms, Inc. is the correct licensor.

This is a valid non-academic source reference (a software license document), and the Hugging Face URL correctly resolves to the license file.

EXPLANATION: The Llama 3.1 Community License Agreement is a real, official license document authored by Meta Platforms, Inc., released July 23, 2024. The cited URL correctly points to the license file in the HuggingFace model repository.

LINK: https://www.llama.com/llama3_1/license/

FOUND_TITLE: LLAMA 3.1 COMMUNITY LICENSE AGREEMENT

FOUND_AUTHORS: Meta Platforms, Inc.

FOUND_YEAR: 2024

VERDICT: UNLIKELY
